svg.title: SAP BTP Full CF Hierarchy v7
svg.text: CF Environment — PaaS runtime · 1 org per subaccount
isolated by tenant ID + client ID
deployed iFlows · calls XSUAA · Destination · Connectivity
record in CCDB · space_id · tenant_id · plan
record in CCDB · space_id · connection configs
record in CCDB · space_id · tunnel config
own App Defs · Routes · Service Instances
can have separate XSUAA · Destination · Connectivity instances
Diego Cell VMs — runtime: shared across all spaces (part of CF Environment)
calls XSUAA · Destination · Connectivity at runtime
GoRouter directs incoming HTTP traffic here
Space 1 + Space 2 apps can share same Diego Cell
no dedicated cell per space — scheduler places freely
Diego Cells = inside CF Env, shared across all spaces
Integration Suite — separate service subscription (not inside CF Environment)
iFlows run here — NOT Diego Cells
↑ IS has its own runtime — iFlows do not run on Diego Cells. IS runtime nodes are in SAP Global Infrastructure (amber box, right).
installed in customer network · outside BTP
